center.name: 加利福尼亞洋流
center.summary: 加利福尼亞洋流是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Guadalupe murrelet、Scripps's murrelet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Guadalupe murrelet (Synthliboramphus hypoleucus) or Xantus's murrelet is a small seabird found in the California Current system in the Pacific Ocean

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Scripps's murrelet (Synthliboramphus scrippsi) is a small seabird found in the California Current system in the Pacific Ocean
